title: Space's day counter
description: Track your progress with the Day Counter Datapack, which displays the number of days you've survived in your world right on your scoreboard!
body:
## ⏳ Day Counter: World Chronometer

Ever wonder just how long you've survived the blocky wilds? The Day Counter is a lightweight but impactful mod/datapack that brings a persistent timeline to your Minecraft experience.

![day counter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6958466eefd5ca23c9bd2a00d8e04369c6fd69a.png)

Key Features:
- Always Visible: A clear, non-intrusive HUD element displays the current in-game day count.
 
- Accurate Tracking: Records the true age of your world, starting from day 1, even if you leave and return.
  
- Survival Milestone Tracking: Ideal for challenge runs! Set goals like "Survive for 100 days" or "Beat the Ender Dragon before day 50."
  
- Simple Setup: Install it and forget it—it works seamlessly and unobtrusively with your existing setup.
  
Whether you're building a massive kingdom, starting a new hardcore challenge, or simply want to document your journey, this Day Counter is the essential tool for any Minecraft chronologist!
